notes: These evals require an active authenticated Wix session in Chrome. They cannot be run in a sandboxed environment without real credentials. The workflow was validated live during the skill's creation session (261 rows, 27 columns, payment status confirmed present).

evals.prompt: Export all submissions from my Wix registration form at https://manage.wix.com/dashboard/.../wix-forms/form/.../submissions — I need all columns including payment status, the built-in export is missing it.
evals.expected_output: A CSV file containing all submission rows (matching the count shown in the Submissions badge) with all selected columns including Payment info/paymentStatus. File saved to ~/Downloads and presented to user.

evals.prompt: I have 150 Wix form submissions and the export button only gives me some columns. Can you grab everything including who paid?
evals.expected_output: Navigates to the Wix submissions page, scrolls table to load all rows, extracts all columns via DOM, builds CSV with payment status included, triggers download.

evals.prompt: Get me a spreadsheet of all 261 Wix form responses with every field
evals.expected_output: Full CSV with header row + 261 data rows, all columns present, no truncation, file presented with clickable link.
